test_cases.test_case: Login succeeds with valid credentials
preconditions: User is on the Login page
steps: 1. Enter username standard_user
2. Enter password secret_sauce
3. Click Login
test_cases.expected_result: User is authenticated and redirected to the Product Inventory page; header with hamburger, title, and cart icon is visible

test_cases.test_case: Login fails with empty username
preconditions: User is on the Login page
steps: 1. Leave Username empty
2. Enter password secret_sauce
3. Click Login
test_cases.expected_result: Error banner displays: Epic sadface: Username is required.

test_cases.test_case: Login fails with empty password
preconditions: User is on the Login page
steps: 1. Enter username standard_user
2. Leave Password empty
3. Click Login
test_cases.expected_result: Error banner displays: Epic sadface: Password is required.

test_cases.test_case: Login fails with invalid credentials
preconditions: User is on the Login page
steps: 1. Enter username invalid_user
2. Enter password wrong_password
3. Click Login
test_cases.expected_result: Error banner displays: Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service.

test_cases.test_case: Locked out user cannot login
preconditions: User is on the Login page
steps: 1. Enter username locked_out_user
2. Enter password secret_sauce
3. Click Login
test_cases.expected_result: Error banner displays: Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.

test_cases.test_case: Add single item to cart updates button text and cart badge
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user and on Product Inventory page
steps: 1. Locate product 'Sauce Labs Backpack'
2. Click Add to cart for that product
test_cases.expected_result: Add to cart button changes to Remove for that item and cart icon badge increments to 1

test_cases.test_case: Remove item from inventory updates button and badge
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user and has at least one item in cart
steps: 1. On Product Inventory or Product Detail page, click Remove for an item currently in cart
test_cases.expected_result: Button text changes from Remove back to Add to cart and cart badge decrements accordingly

test_cases.test_case: Open Product Detail from inventory and toggle cart state
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user and on Product Inventory page
steps: 1. Click the product name or image for any listed product
2. On Product Detail page, verify product image, name, description, and price are shown
3. Click Add to cart (or Remove) on the detail page
test_cases.expected_result: Product Detail shows correct product information; Add to cart button toggles to Remove and cart badge updates; Back to products returns to Inventory

test_cases.test_case: Shopping Cart lists added items and allows removal
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user and one or more items have been added to cart
steps: 1. Click the cart icon to open Shopping Cart
2. Verify each item shows name, description, quantity 1, price, and Remove button
3. Click Remove for an item
test_cases.expected_result: Removed item disappears from cart, cart badge decrements, and cart totals update accordingly

test_cases.test_case: Complete checkout flow successfully
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user and has at least one item in cart
steps: 1. Open Shopping Cart and click Checkout
2. On Checkout Information, enter First Name, Last Name, and Postal Code and click Continue
3. On Checkout Overview, verify items and totals then click Finish
test_cases.expected_result: User lands on Confirmation page with success message Thank you for your order!; clicking Back Home returns to Product Inventory and cart is cleared

test_cases.test_case: Checkout information fails when First Name is missing
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user and has at least one item in cart
User is on Checkout - Information page
steps: 1. Leave First Name empty
2. Enter valid Last Name and Postal Code
3. Click Continue
test_cases.expected_result: Error banner displays: Error: First Name is required and user remains on Information step

test_cases.test_case: Checkout information fails when Last Name is missing
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user and has at least one item in cart
User is on Checkout - Information page
steps: 1. Enter valid First Name
2. Leave Last Name empty
3. Enter valid Postal Code and click Continue
test_cases.expected_result: Error banner displays: Error: Last Name is required and user remains on Information step

test_cases.test_case: Checkout information fails when Postal Code is missing
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user and has at least one item in cart
User is on Checkout - Information page
steps: 1. Enter valid First Name and Last Name
2. Leave Postal Code empty
3. Click Continue
test_cases.expected_result: Error banner displays: Error: Postal Code is required and user remains on Information step

test_cases.test_case: Checkout Overview displays order summary and totals
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user, has items in cart, and has completed Checkout Information with valid values
steps: 1. On Checkout Overview, review listed items and verify item prices
2. Verify totals section shows Item total, Tax, and Total
3. Click Cancel to exit checkout
test_cases.expected_result: Overview shows correct items and calculated totals; clicking Cancel returns user to Shopping Cart

test_cases.test_case: Confirmation Back Home clears cart and returns to inventory
preconditions: User has completed checkout and is on Confirmation page
steps: 1. Verify success message is displayed on Confirmation page
2. Click Back Home
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to Product Inventory and cart is empty with badge cleared and Add to cart buttons reset

test_cases.test_case: Sort dropdown sorts products by name and price
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user and on Product Inventory page
steps: 1. Open sort dropdown and select Name (A to Z)
2. Observe product order
3. Select Name (Z to A), then Price (low to high), then Price (high to low)
test_cases.expected_result: Product list reorders correctly for each sort option

test_cases.test_case: Add multiple items verifies badge increments and persists across pages
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user and on Product Inventory page
steps: 1. Add three different products to the cart from the Inventory page
2. Navigate to one Product Detail and verify cart badge still shows 3
3. Go to Shopping Cart and verify all three items are listed
test_cases.expected_result: Cart badge shows 3 across pages; Shopping Cart lists three items each with quantity 1

test_cases.test_case: Reset App State clears cart and resets button states without logging out
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user and has one or more items in cart
steps: 1. Open hamburger menu and click Reset App State
2. Observe cart badge and Add/Remove buttons on Inventory
test_cases.expected_result: Cart is cleared, badge removed or set to 0, Add to cart buttons are reset to initial state, and user remains logged in

test_cases.test_case: Protected pages are inaccessible after logout
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user
steps: 1. Open hamburger menu and click Logout
2. Attempt to navigate directly to Inventory, Product Detail, Cart, and Checkout URLs
test_cases.expected_result: User is returned to Login page and access to protected pages requires re-authentication

test_cases.test_case: Checkout accepts long postal code input boundary
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user and has at least one item in cart
steps: 1. Start Checkout and enter First Name and Last Name
2. Enter a very long Postal Code string of 50 characters
3. Click Continue
test_cases.expected_result: System either accepts the postal code if within field constraints or shows a validation error; no application crash occurs

test_cases.test_case: Form fields handle extremely long First/Last names
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user and on Checkout Information page
steps: 1. Enter First Name and Last Name with 255-character strings
2. Enter a valid Postal Code and click Continue
test_cases.expected_result: System accepts inputs within allowed length or shows clear validation errors; page remains responsive and no data corruption occurs

test_cases.test_case: Rapid add/remove toggle does not desync cart state
preconditions: User is logged in as standard_user and on Product Inventory page
steps: 1. Rapidly click Add to cart and Remove for the same product multiple times
2. Observe button label and cart badge after toggling
test_cases.expected_result: Final state of button and cart badge matches the last action; no duplicate entries or negative counts occur
